details: Installed Thjodann/Wikiwiki into PRISM, initialized the Wikiwiki config and record store, added npm scripts, and rendered the initial Markdown wiki plus static wiki site.

summary: Wiki site restyled with PRISM visual language
details: Reworked .wikiwiki/site-theme.json to use PRISM app CSS cues: dark-by-default warm shell, cream text, refracted spectrum accents, conic brand mark, radial hero glows, glassy cards, large radii, and a warm neutral light fallback.

summary: Wikiwiki updated and first-run theming retested
details: Updated the installed wk dependency to Wikiwiki commit ab7e817 and verified the initial setup/theme/render/site path against PRISM source files. Theme preview now sanitizes README logo HTML, inspects PRISM CSS/design sources, and generates a dark-first PRISM-branded site without hand-editing generated CSS.

Updated the PRISM root @thjodann/wk devDependency and package lock from 1.0.0 to the current npm release 1.0.2, then refreshed the Codex wk agent skill with the updated CLI and verified wiki validation, render, and site generation.

summary: Bot library and marketplace UX refined
details: Marketplace bot, pack, starter, and Lens installs now show the same progress overlay used for bot import/export flows. Bot group dashboards behave like focused canvas views: clicking the open canvas outside the group card returns to the full bot directory. Single-bot context menus can add that bot to an existing eligible custom group through a dropdown, and bot group detail dialogs no longer close from backdrop clicks while editing text.

Updated the PRISM root @thjodann/wk devDependency and package lock to the current npm release 1.0.3, then refreshed the Codex wk agent skill with the updated CLI and verified wiki validation, render, and site generation.

Updated the PRISM root @thjodann/wk devDependency and package lock to the current npm release 1.0.4, then refreshed the Codex wk agent skill with the updated CLI and verified the repo Wikiwiki status.

Updated the PRISM root @thjodann/wk devDependency and package lock to the current npm release 1.0.4, refreshed the Codex wk agent skill with the updated CLI, and verified Wikiwiki status, validation, Markdown render, and all-audience site generation.

summary: Wiki site wired to PRISM brand graphics
details: Added PRISM logo, wordmark, and favicon asset paths to the Wikiwiki site theme so the generated static wiki uses the repo-local PRISM triangle mark and wordmark instead of fallback initials.
